events.title: A new little look
events.text: You choose a small detail that makes your profile feel more like you.

choices.label: Pick something bright
choices.outcome: The cheerful accessory becomes part of your look.

choices.label: Keep it simple
choices.outcome: The understated choice feels exactly right.

events.title: A toy just out of reach
events.text: A colourful toy waits a tiny distance away.

choices.label: Reach for it
choices.outcome: After a determined wiggle, your fingers finally touch it.

choices.label: Try it a different way
choices.outcome: The moment unfolds a little differently, but still becomes part of your story.

events.title: The tallest tower possible
events.text: A pile of blocks is waiting to become something important.

choices.label: Build a huge tower
choices.outcome: It stands for three glorious seconds before collapsing.

choices.label: Build a tiny house
choices.outcome: You carefully make room for every imaginary resident.

events.title: Again from the beginning
events.text: A grown-up finishes the picture book, but you are absolutely not done with it.

choices.label: Ask for it again
choices.outcome: By the third reading, you can predict every page.

choices.label: Try it a different way
choices.outcome: The moment unfolds a little differently, but still becomes part of your story.

events.title: Quieting the hunger
events.text: You focus on your breathing until the pulse of every nearby heartbeat fades into the background.

choices.label: Hold the meditation
choices.outcome: The hunger loosens its grip, and your thoughts become your own again.

choices.label: Try it a different way
choices.outcome: The moment unfolds a little differently, but still becomes part of your story.

events.title: Above the sleeping streets
events.text: The city looks entirely different from the rooftops after midnight.

choices.label: Race across the rooftops
choices.outcome: For one hour, the night belongs completely to you.

choices.label: Watch the city quietly
choices.outcome: You notice a thousand small lives continuing below.

events.title: A shelf you never noticed
events.text: A display near the back of the library invites you into a subject you know almost nothing about.

choices.label: Follow the curiosity
choices.outcome: One book becomes three and the afternoon disappears.

choices.label: Choose a story instead
choices.outcome: You return home from somewhere that never existed.

choices.label: Join a community talk
choices.outcome: A thoughtful question becomes a new conversation afterward.

events.title: The path forks
events.text: Your usual route meets a quieter path you have always meant to explore.

choices.label: Take the unfamiliar path
choices.outcome: It climbs farther than expected and ends at a remarkable view.

choices.label: Stay with the familiar route
choices.outcome: The reliable rhythm clears your head.

choices.label: Turn it into a workout
choices.outcome: You return tired in the satisfying way.

events.title: More hands than boxes
events.text: The community project is busy, cheerful, and only loosely organized.

choices.label: Create a simple system
choices.outcome: Labels and a clear queue turn confusion into momentum.

choices.label: Welcome new volunteers
choices.outcome: Nobody stands alone for long, including you.

choices.label: Take on the physical work
choices.outcome: The stack shrinks steadily under determined hands.

events.title: The beginner's table
events.text: The short course begins with everyone admitting what they do not know yet.

choices.label: Choose a practical skill
choices.outcome: By the end, you can make something that works.

choices.label: Choose a creative skill
choices.outcome: Your first attempt is imperfect, personal, and finished.

choices.label: Choose a discussion workshop
choices.outcome: Listening well proves to be its own demanding skill.

events.title: One day, somewhere else
events.text: A nearby place offers three ways to spend your brief escape from routine.

choices.label: Explore the local museum
choices.outcome: A small exhibition changes how you see an ordinary object.

choices.label: Follow the food stalls
choices.outcome: Lunch becomes the destination, and nobody regrets it.

choices.label: Walk without a plan
choices.outcome: You find a quiet square no guide mentioned.

events.title: The final five minutes
events.text: The instructor promises the hardest section is nearly over. The clock has other ideas.

choices.label: Keep a sustainable pace
choices.outcome: You finish strong enough to smile afterward.

choices.label: Give the last burst everything
choices.outcome: You surprise yourself, then spend a while becoming friends with the floor.

choices.label: Switch to stretching
choices.outcome: Listening to your body turns out to be the wiser challenge.

events.title: The game on the table
events.text: The evening needs one decision: cooperative teamwork, friendly competition, or stories without rules.

choices.label: Choose a cooperative game
choices.outcome: The group saves the imaginary world with seconds to spare.

choices.label: Choose something competitive
choices.outcome: A dramatic final move earns cheers and one playful accusation.

choices.label: Put the game away and talk
choices.outcome: The conversation becomes more memorable than any score.

events.title: The sensible appointment
events.text: The clinician reviews your habits and asks which part of your health you most want to improve.

choices.label: Focus on sleep
choices.outcome: A realistic evening routine starts to make mornings gentler.

choices.label: Focus on movement
choices.outcome: You leave with a simple plan that does not require becoming a different person.

choices.label: Focus on stress
choices.outcome: Naming the pressure makes it easier to change how you carry it.

events.title: A quiet page
events.text: With no audience and no deadline, the page can hold whichever part of your life needs attention.

choices.label: Notice what went well
choices.outcome: Several ordinary good things become visible again.

choices.label: Untangle a problem
choices.outcome: The problem remains, but now it has edges and a possible first step.

choices.label: Write to your future self
choices.outcome: The letter asks for patience, courage, and a surprisingly specific snack.
